properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3 v7 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The grace of God has reached for me And pulled me from a raging sea And I am safe on this solid ground The Lord is my salvation

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will not fear when darkness falls His strength will help me scale these walls I'll see the dawn of the rising sun The Lord is my salvation

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Who is like the Lord, our God? Strong to save, faithful in love My debt is paid and the victory won The Lord is my salvation

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My hope is hidden in the Lord He flowers each promise of His Word When winter fades, I know spring will come The Lord is my salvation

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: In times of waiting, times of need, When I know loss, when I am weak, I know His grace will renew these days The Lord is my salvation

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And when I reach my final day He will not leave me in the grave But I will rise, He will call me home The Lord is my salvation

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Glory be to God the Father Glory be to God the Son Glory be to God the Spirit The Lord is our salvation

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: The Lord is our salvation The Lord is our salvation (Our salvation, ooh-yeah, ooh, ooh)
